2026-04-12 00:20:36.608 [info] Connection state: Error 401 status sending message to https://mcp.make.com/: {"code":"SC401","name":"Access denied","message":"Unauthorized.","details":[]}

how to auth?

The user is getting an error connecting to an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server at https://mcp.make.com/ with a 401 Unauthorized error. They're asking how to authenticate.

This appears to be related to VS Code's connection to an external MCP server. Looking at the workspace, this seems to be a CV/resume website project, but the error is about MCP authentication.

The error message suggests:
1. There's an attempt to connect to https://mcp.make.com/
2. The connection is failing with a 401 (Unauthorized) status
3. The error is being logged in VS Code

This could be related to:
1. MCP server configuration in VS Code settings
2. API key/token authentication needed for the MCP server
3. The workspace might have MCP configuration files

Let me first check if there are any MCP configuration files in the workspace or in VS Code settings that might help understand what's happening.

I should look for:
1. MCP configuration files (often in .vscode or root)
2. Settings that reference mcp.make.com
3. Any environment variables or configuration files

Let me search the workspace for MCP-related files.
